rationale: Mechanical migration of the second half of execute_bead_loop_test.go from `ExecuteBeadLoopOptions{}` to `RunWithConfig` + `ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{}` using the `config.TestLoopConfigOpts` / `NewTestConfigForLoop` pattern. Conversions correctly route durable fields (`Assignee`, `Harness`, `Model`, `MaxNoChangesBeforeClose`) through the resolved config and keep runtime plumbing (`Once`, `EventSink`, `WorkerID`, `ProjectRoot`, `SessionID`) on the runtime struct, consistent with SD-024 Stage 1.
